message:
fix(vacuum): lowercase DDL lookup keys to match original_ddl_sql storage

original_ddl_sql stores keys lowercased (via to_ascii_lowercase in
reload_memdb_from_txn_with_mode), but the persist lookups used the
original-case table/index names. This would cause the DDL lookup to
miss for mixed-case object names, silently falling back to lossy
reconstruction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
